heading: Create the Indexes
body:
Run the following code to create
a [index definition](avs-types-vector-search) that indexes the
`plot_embedding_voyage_3_large` field in the collection.

```python
# Use helper method to create the vector search index
vector_store.create_vector_search_index(
   dimensions = 2048 # The dimensions of the vector embeddings to be indexed
)
```

> **Tip:** [create\_vector\_search\_index API Reference](https://langchain-mongodb.readthedocs.io/en/latest/langchain_mongodb/index/langchain_mongodb.index.create_vector_search_index.html)

Run the following code in your notebook to create a
[MongoDB Search indexes](fts-manage-indexes)
that indexes the `plot` field in the collection.

```python
from langchain_mongodb.index import create_fulltext_search_index
from pymongo import MongoClient

# Connect to your cluster
client = MongoClient(MONGODB_URI)

# Use helper method to create the search index
create_fulltext_search_index(
   collection = client["sample_mflix"]["embedded_movies"],
   field = "plot",
   index_name = "search_index"
)
```

> **Tip:** [create\_fulltext\_search\_index API Reference](https://langchain-mongodb.readthedocs.io/en/latest/langchain_mongodb/index/langchain_mongodb.index.create_fulltext_search_index.html)
